questions.question: Does the school district have a policy sustainability?
questions.answer: Yes, the school district has a policy on sustainability. The Environmental Policy (0115) includes curriculum that promotes preservation of a safe environment, encourages solid waste source reduction, supports the collection and purchase of recyclables, effects energy efficiency, and promotes the proper use and disposal of materials.

questions.question: Does the school district have a sustainability committee?
Does the school district have a comprehensive plan for sustainability?
